mapper.select:
SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y') AS nd, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM szjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y')
UNION ALL
SELECT t.DWDM AS sjdm, t.DEPT_ID AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y') AS nd, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM sjjfcx T
GROUP BY t.DWDM, t.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y')
UNION ALL
SELECT T.DWDM AS sjdm, T.SDDM AS xjdm, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y') AS nd, COUNT(T.DJXH) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) AS hs, SUM(T.YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(T.JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS sdghje, SUM(T.CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(T.XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(T.SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(T.SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(T.QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(T.SWJGJE) AS swjgje, SUM(T.SDSJE) AS sdsje FROM sjhyjfcx t
GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.SDDM, T.DEPT_ID, date_format(T.RKRQ, '%Y')
